description: ETE3 rooted-tree render to PNG with Newick fallback (Newick tree -> PNG).
rules: read-only on inputs; writes one artifact (tree.png) under record_store
roots at OUTGROUP if it matches a leaf, otherwise applies midpoint rooting; shows leaf names + branch support
requires the ete3 Python package (and a working render backend); without it the porter degrades gracefully and emits {}
usage: Set TREE_FILE (a Newick tree). Optional OUTGROUP (taxon name for rooting). Output: tree.png (rooted Newick saved alongside if PNG rendering fails).
limitation: Needs ete3 installed (pip install ete3); PNG rendering also needs a Qt/display backend. Offline / without ete3 the image is not produced; the output is a graceful {} placeholder.
